scripts.sync-contract: cp ../nimbus/clients/ts/src/schema.d.ts src/lib/api/schema.d.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=fs.readFileSync('src/lib/api/schema.d.ts','utf8').split('\n')[0].match(/^\/\/ nimbus-contract: (.+)$/);if(!m){console.error('sync-contract: copied schema has no contract header - regenerate backend clients (scripts/gen-clients.sh) first');process.exit(1)}const p='./package.json';const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));d.nimbusContract=m[1];fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)+'\n');console.log('sync-contract: vendored schema + pinned nimbusContract '+m[1])"
scripts.check-contract: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pin=require('./package.json').nimbusContract;const m=fs.readFileSync('src/lib/api/schema.d.ts','utf8').split('\n')[0].match(/^\/\/ nimbus-contract: (.+)$/);if(!m){console.error('check-contract: vendored schema has no contract header - run pnpm sync-contract (or await the backend bot delivery)');process.exit(1)}if(m[1]!==pin){console.error('check-contract: schema header '+m[1]+' != nimbusContract pin '+pin+' - run pnpm sync-contract or fix the pin');process.exit(1)}console.log('check-contract: OK - vendored schema matches pin '+pin)"
